Title: User Authenticates Successfully
Preconditions: Firebase is set up with authentication enabled.
Test Steps:
1. Enter valid email and password.
2. Click on the login button.
Expected Result: User is authenticated successfully and redirected to the dashboard.

Title: User Authenticates with Invalid Credentials
Preconditions: Firebase is set up with authentication enabled.
Test Steps:
1. Enter invalid email and password.
2. Click on the login button.
Expected Result: Authentication fails, and an error message is displayed.

Title: User Displays Valid Data
Preconditions: User is authenticated and data is stored in Firebase.
Test Steps:
1. User requests data display.
2. Data organizer retrieves data from Firebase.
3. Data is displayed to the user.
Expected Result: Valid data is displayed to the user.

Title: User Attempts to Display Invalid Data
Preconditions: User is authenticated but data is invalid or missing.
Test Steps:
1. User requests data display.
2. Data organizer attempts to retrieve data from Firebase.
3. Data retrieval fails due to invalid or missing data.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating invalid or missing data.

Title: User Creates a New Chat
Preconditions: User is authenticated.
Test Steps:
1. User initiates a new chat.
2. System creates a new chat entry in the database.
3. User is added as a participant in the chat.
Expected Result: New chat created successfully with user as a participant.

Title: User Sends a Message
Preconditions: User is authenticated and part of a chat.
Test Steps:
1. User composes a message.
2. User sends the message.
3. Message is stored in the database.
Expected Result: Message sent successfully and stored in the database.

Title: User Receives a Message
Preconditions: User is authenticated and part of a chat.
Test Steps:
1. Another user sends a message.
2. System updates the chat with the new message.
3. User receives the message.
Expected Result: User receives the message in their chat interface.

Title: User Interacts with Fridge
Preconditions: User is authenticated and has access to a fridge.
Test Steps:
1. User selects a fridge.
2. System retrieves fridge details from the database.
3. User interacts with the fridge.
Expected Result: Fridge details are displayed, and user interactions are recorded.

Title: User Posts Content
Preconditions: User is authenticated and has access to a fridge.
Test Steps:
1. User composes a post.
2. User associates the post with a fridge.
3. Post is stored in the database.
Expected Result: Post is successfully stored and associated with the fridge.

Title: Change Fragment and Remove Product
Preconditions: User is authenticated and has access to a product.
Test Steps:
1. User changes the current fragment.
2. System triggers the removal of a product.
3. Product is removed from the database.
Expected Result: Fragment change successful, and product is removed from the database.

Title: Attempt to Remove Nonexistent Product
Preconditions: User is authenticated and tries to remove a nonexistent product.
Test Steps:
1. User changes the current fragment.
2. System attempts to remove a nonexistent product.
3. Removal fails due to invalid product ID.
Expected Result: Error message indicating the product does not exist. Fragment change still occurs.

Title: Change Fragment Without Removing Product
Preconditions: User is authenticated and does not attempt to remove a product.
Test Steps:
1. User changes the current fragment.
2. System does not trigger product removal.
3. Fragment change successful without any product removal.
Expected Result: Fragment change successful, and no product is removed from the database.

Title: Change Fragment and Remove Multiple Products
Preconditions: User is authenticated and has access to multiple products.
Test Steps:
1. User changes the current fragment.
2. System triggers the removal of multiple products.
3. All specified products are removed from the database.
Expected Result: Fragment change successful, and all specified products are removed from the database.

Title: Change Fragment and Remove Product with Edge Cases
Preconditions: User is authenticated and has access to a product.
Test Data: Edge case product ID (e.g., maximum integer value).
Test Steps:
1. User changes the current fragment.
2. System triggers the removal of a product with an edge case ID.
3. Product is removed from the database.
Expected Result: Fragment change successful, and product with edge case ID is removed from the database.

Title: Change Fragment and Remove Product with Invalid ID
Preconditions: User is authenticated and tries to remove a product with an invalid ID.
Test Steps:
1. User changes the current fragment.
2. System attempts to remove a product with an invalid ID.
3. Removal fails due to invalid product ID.
Expected Result: Error message indicating the product does not exist. Fragment change still occurs.

Title: Change Fragment and Remove Product with Empty ID
Preconditions: User is authenticated and tries to remove a product with an empty ID.
Test Steps:

2. System attempts to remove a product with an empty ID.
3. Removal fails due to empty product ID.
Expected Result: Error message indicating the product ID cannot be empty. Fragment change still occurs.
